calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lisa Kohli, via zoom, for Tobias Hampton, Petitioner.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to this petition and that Ms. Kohli has not heard from Robin Risner regarding an objection.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-25-2022 Continued To Mar-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robin Risner, present in court, in propria persona, Interested Party.

This matter had been pre-granted by the court. The court confirms with Ms. Risner that she is appearing this morning to object to the court's pre-granted order regarding the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets in this matter. The court summarizes the objection process and advises Ms. Rinser that the court requires formal, written objections to be filed. Ms. Risner advises that she believes that there are discrepancies in the administration of the trust and that she is currently seeking legal advice.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to Mar-01-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises that objections must be filed by Feb-15-2022 and responses to objections must be filed by Feb-22-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.
